message:
fix(min_edge_cover): raise NetworkXError, not the abstract base class

Round 42 r42c1-01 (commit 4aeb763) rewrote min_edge_cover to handle
fnx-typed matching_algorithm callables. The new signature-validation
branch raised NetworkXException (the abstract base) when called on a
graph with isolated nodes — but the public surface contract is to raise
NetworkXError, the concrete public alias, and
test_error_messages.TestNetworkXError.test_min_edge_cover_isolated_node
matches against pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXError, ...). Tightening the
exception class to NetworkXError lets that test pass and matches the
documented contract for fnx error messages.

Also regenerates docs/coverage.md to reflect the recent surface shifts
(planarity counterexample wrappers, simple-paths backend kwargs, Tarjan
tree-LCA — all landed by cod-networkx earlier this session).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
